mapper.insert:
/* insertWalsmaList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WALSMA( ALSTRMD, ALSTRNM, ALSTRTG, ALSTROD, ALUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.alstrmd}, #{item.alstrnm}, #{item.alstrtg}, #{item.alstrod}, #{item.aluseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWalsmaList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WALSMA SET ALSTRTG = #{item.alstrtg}, ALSTRNM = #{item.alstrnm}, ALSTROD = #{item.alstrod}, ALUSEYN = #{item.aluseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE ALSTRMD = #{item.alstrmd}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWalshdList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WALSHD( WAREKEY, ALSTRKY, ALSTRNM, ALUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.alstrky}, #{item.alstrnm}, #{item.aluseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWalshdList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WALSHD SET ALSTRNM = #{item.alstrnm}, ALUSEYN = #{item.aluseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND ALSTRKY = #{item.alstrky}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWalsitList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WALSIT( WAREKEY, ALSTRKY, ALSTRIT, ALSTRMD, ALSTRWG, ALSTRST, ALESTYN, ALUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.alstrky}, #{item.alstrit}, #{item.alstrmd}, #{item.alstrwg}, #{item.alstrst}, #{item.alestyn}, #{item.aluseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWalsitList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WALSIT SET ALSTRMD = #{item.alstrmd}, ALSTRWG = #{item.alstrwg}, ALSTRST = #{item.alstrst}, ALESTYN = #{item.alestyn}, ALUSEYN = #{item.aluseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND ALSTRKY = #{item.alstrky} AND ALSTRIT = #{item.alstrit}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWalordList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WALORD ( WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, ALSTRKY, ALUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.alstrky}, #{item.aluseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract} )
mapper.update:
/* updateWalordList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WALORD SET ALSTRKY = #{item.alstrky}, ALUSEYN = #{item.aluseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND DOCCATE = #{item.doccate}, AND DOCTYPE = #{item.doctype}
